query: UPDATE drillAssignments da JOIN users u ON da.userId = u.id SET da.athleteName = u.name WHERE da.athleteName IS NULL;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3knp7kHgPS8ePkR.root --database 4gdCHRuKFjrDK3bmH43Eh2 --execute UPDATE drillAssignments da JOIN users u ON da.userId = u.id SET da.athleteName = u.name WHERE da.athleteName IS NULL;
